name: Rogz Dog ginz-Treat Ball 7.8cm – Blue Large
shortDescription: Keep your large dog entertained with the Rogz Grinz Treat Ball 7.8 cm – Blue. Durable, floatable, and treat-dispensing for active play and mental stimulation.
description: The Rogz Grinz Treat Ball is a versatile, interactive toy designed to keep large dogs physically active and mentally stimulated. This 7.8 cm blue treat ball combines chewing, fetching, and treat-dispensing in one fun and durable design. Made from SEBS rubber, it’s soft enough to protect your dog’s teeth while remaining firm enough to bounce effectively during indoor or outdoor play. The Grinz Treat Ball can be filled with your dog’s favorite treats, encouraging problem-solving and extended engagement. Its floating capability makes it ideal for water play or pool games, adding an extra layer of excitement to exercise sessions. The playful teeth design also makes dogs appear to “grin” while playing, creating a fun visual element that owners will enjoy. Key Features Durable SEBS Material: Safe for chewing while firm enough for bouncing. Interactive Treat Dispensing: Stuff treats inside for extended mental stimulation. Floating Design: Perfect for water-based play and outdoor activities. Medium Bite Rating: Bite-O-Meter level 3, ideal for medium to large breeds. Fun Visual Design: Teeth pattern creates a playful “grin” while chewing or playing. Specifications Brand: Rogz Color: Blue Size: Large, 7.8 cm diameter Weight: 4.8 ounces (136 g)
